title: ご飯を、諦めない――オグリキャップ

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my lunch break one day, I find Oguri Cap
clutching a lunch box and letting out a subtle
sigh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Given her famously enormous appetite, I'm
surprised she's not at the cafeteria scarfing down
everything in sight.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah...
Ngh.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Urk...
It's no use. I'm still hungry...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But I can't go to the cafeteria...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I was eating my usual amount in the cafeteria
yesterday, when...

text_block_list.name: Dieting Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oguri's so lucky. She can eat all that and still maintain
her racing weight. I guess she must have good
metabolism or something...

text_block_list.name: Dieting Umamusume
text_block_list.text: No matter how much I run or how little I eat, I still struggle to hit my target. I wish I could eat without a care too... Sigh... Life can be so cruel.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It surprised me. I didn't realize that people can't
always eat what they want, or as much as they
want...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Or even that people could be sad when they see
me eat a lot.
choice_data_list:
So that's why you're eating out here on your
own?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah. But one lunch box... isn't enough.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I want to eat more...
choice_data_list: I bet there's a reason you eat so much.
I bet there's a reason you eat so much.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I want to eat more...
choice_data_list: I bet there's a reason you eat so much.
I bet there's a reason you eat so much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are plenty of students besides Oguri Cap
who eat a lot. Even if she started eating less, I
doubt things would get any easier for that other
Umamusume.
choice_data_list:
That's just how it is. She'll have to make peace
with that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Maybe you're right. But still... It makes me sad.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Eating should make everyone happy, but it's only
bringing her suffering... and that's tragic...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know Oguri Cap's heart is in the right place, but
she's not helping anyone by starving herself. And
since she can't change reality, she might as well...
choice_data_list:
You should have a great big meal tomorrow.
Like, really go for it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh? But...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. I will.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Oguri's eating even more than usual today.
And still...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
She looks so happy... It's actually kinda making
me wanna eat more too!

text_block_list.name: Dieting Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Urk... It all looks sooo good. Fried rice, ramen, fried
chicken...
I mean... oil, carbs, oily carbs... I can't touch any of that!

text_block_list.name: Dieting Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Nghhh... That's it! I can't hold out forever! Carbs
and oily foods are just too delicious!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...!
That's the girl from yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Dieting Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should try talking to a dietitian or
something...
Yeah! We can figure it out together!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah.
Do your best!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Now, where was I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap does eat a huge—no, an astonishing amount of food. But she's astonishingly active as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's true for other Umamusume as well, but...
given the sheer quantity of food Oguri Cap
consumes, her exercise regimen must be on
another level entirely.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I see... So that's it...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Basically... I just have to show her that I eat a lot
and I exercise a whole lot too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So all we have to do is train together!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
After this break, we're doing crunches. Ten sets of
a hundred.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That afternoon, I spot Oguri Cap exercising
alongside a younger student.

text_block_list.name: Dieting Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Th-this is... ridiculous...

text_block_list.name: Dieting Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Um, Oguri... Do you always train this hard?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
No... I reduced the number of sets since we're
training together today. Usually, I do about...
twice as many?

text_block_list.name: Dieting Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Geez... No wonder you eat so much.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
How about you? Are you going to eat a whole lot
today?

text_block_list.name: Dieting Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The food you have after this training session will
taste incredible. I guarantee it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
First you train hard, then you eat your favorite
foods. It's fine to have days like that sometimes!

text_block_list.name: Dieting Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
So if I can just keep up with this level of training... I can
stop worrying about calories, huh?

text_block_list.name: Dieting Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Um, Oguri! Add some more weight, please. I want
to eat a bowl of ramen heaping with roast pork
after this!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...!
Right!
